display.purpose: Top-level page titles and prominent stats.

body.purpose: Default interface copy and table content.

label.purpose: Dense metadata and compact control labels.

shadows.name: surface-lift
shadows.purpose: Subtle separation for cards and bordered controls.

motion.name: state-standard
motion.purpose: Default state transition for hover, focus, and selection.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Default call-to-action for primary task actions.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: var(--color-primary); color: var(--color-primary-foreground); border: 1px solid transparent; border-radius: 0.7rem; height: 2.25rem; padding: 0 0.625rem; font-family: var(--font-sans); font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; transition: background 200ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1), transform 120ms ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: color-mix(in oklch, var(--color-primary), black 12%); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: translateY(1px); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid color-mix(in oklch, var(--color-ring), transparent 50%); outline-offset: 1px; }

components.name: Outline Button
components.description: Secondary action preserving low visual weight.
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { background: var(--color-background); color: var(--color-foreground); border: 1px solid var(--color-border); border-radius: 0.7rem; height: 2.25rem; padding: 0 0.625rem; font-family: var(--font-sans); font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; transition: background 200ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-btn-outline:hover { background: var(--color-muted); } .ds-btn-outline:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid color-mix(in oklch, var(--color-ring), transparent 50%); outline-offset: 1px; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Primary single-line field with explicit focus and error affordances.
components.css: .ds-input { width: 100%; min-height: 2.25rem; background: transparent; color: var(--color-foreground); border: 1px solid var(--color-input); border-radius: 0.7rem; padding: 0 0.625rem; font-family: var(--font-sans); font-size: 0.875rem; transition: border-color 200ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1), box-shadow 200ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-input::placeholder { color: var(--color-muted-foreground); } .ds-input:focus-visible { outline: none; border-color: var(--color-ring); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px color-mix(in oklch, var(--color-ring), transparent 50%); }

components.name: Metric Card
components.description: Dashboard summary container for KPI metrics.
components.html:
Tâches actives

12

en cours et à faire
components.css: .ds-card { background: var(--color-card); color: var(--color-card-foreground); border-radius: 1.225rem; border: 1px solid color-mix(in oklch, var(--color-foreground), transparent 90%); box-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05); padding: 1.5rem; display: grid; gap: 0.25rem; } .ds-card-label { margin: 0; color: var(--color-muted-foreground); font-size: 0.875rem; } .ds-card-value { margin: 0; font-family: var(--font-heading); font-size: 1.875rem; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1.2; } .ds-card-note { margin: 0; color: var(--color-muted-foreground); font-size: 0.8125rem; }

components.name: Sidebar Navigation Item
components.description: Compact row for primary app navigation with active-state tint.
components.html: Tableau de bord
components.css: .ds-nav-item { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem; width: 100%; border-radius: 0.7rem; padding: 0.5rem 0.625rem; color: var(--color-sidebar-foreground); text-decoration: none; font-size: 0.875rem; transition: background 200ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1), color 200ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-nav-item:hover { background: var(--color-sidebar-accent); color: var(--color-sidebar-accent-foreground); } .ds-nav-item-active { background: var(--color-sidebar-accent); color: var(--color-sidebar-accent-foreground); font-weight: 500; } .ds-nav-dot { width: 0.375rem; height: 0.375rem; border-radius: 9999px; background: currentColor; opacity: 0.75; }

narrative.overview:
TaskFlow is a product UI for daily execution, not a marketing canvas. The interface must feel simple, efficient, and clear: dense enough to answer operational questions quickly, but restrained enough to keep attention on ownership and status instead of decoration.

The visual language prioritizes predictable interaction patterns, low cognitive load, and immediate state legibility. Panels, tables, badges, and status markers are functional instruments.
keyCharacteristics: Restrained chroma with one operational accent.
Familiar app-shell patterns (sidebar + sticky top bar + content work area).
State-forward UI (active, overdue, selected, invalid) with visible feedback.
Tight, consistent spacing cadence tuned for dashboard workflows.

rules.name: The Accent Scarcity Rule
rules.body: Primary accent is reserved for action and focus states; neutral surfaces carry the rest of the UI.

rules.name: The Readability-First Rule
rules.body: Body and utility text must preserve WCAG AA contrast; muted text can be subtle, never faint.

rules.name: The Task-Flow Rule
rules.body: Typography hierarchy must support scan speed first; decorative contrast is prohibited in workflow-critical surfaces.

rules.name: The Flat-by-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces stay visually stable at rest; depth increases only to communicate interaction or grouping.

dos: Do keep screen structure scannable: heading, key metrics, recent activity, then detail tables.
Do reserve the primary accent for actions, active routes, and focus indicators.
Do keep component vocabulary consistent across all dashboard pages.
Do maintain WCAG AA contrast for body text, placeholders, and status labels.
donts: Don't build overloaded interfaces with a lot of infos.
Don't apply decorative gradients, glassmorphism, or ornamental motion on task surfaces.
Don't introduce multiple competing accent colors in the same workflow view.
Don't weaken text contrast to achieve a minimal look.
